attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT dw_case_activity_key ,incident_id ,incident_number ,casenumber ,incident_status_id ,incident_status ,current_severity ,current_owner_cco_id ,current_owner_group_id
,current_owner_group_name ,current_contract_key ,current_contract_svc_line_id ,current_dw_workgroup_key ,current_serial_number ,activity_code ,activity_name ,activity_date	
,(cast(activity_date as date) - DATE '1989-07-31') -4173 as activity_dw_date_key ,creation_date ,(cast(creation_date as date) - DATE '1989-07-31') - 4173 as creation_dw_date_key,
initial_severity_id ,activity_addnl_info ,res_role ,delivery_channel ,complexity,chg_cco_id ,chg_dw_workgroup_key ,chg_wg_service_type ,sr_type ,note_type ,current_wg_service_type ,
dw_crnt_keyword_key ,work_act_flg ,dispatch_act_flg ,collab_act_flg,status_act_flg ,sev_change_act_flg,prior_work_act ,next_work_act ,prior_dispatch_act ,next_dispatch_act ,
prior_collab_act ,next_collab_act ,next_statuschange_act ,next_sevchange_act ,prev_sevchange_act,pwa_delivery_channel ,pwa_res_role ,nwa_activity_code ,nwa_activity_date ,
nwa_delivery_channel ,nwa_res_role ,nwa_crnt_wg_service_type ,pda_chg_wg_service_type,pda_current_owner_group_name ,nda_prior_work_act ,nda_activity_date ,
nda_chg_wg_service_type ,nda_current_owner_group_name ,pca_activity_date ,pca_activity_code ,nca_activity_date ,nca_activity_code ,next_status ,next_statuschange_date 
,CASE WHEN NEXT_STATUSCHANGE_DATE IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE
(((CAST((CAST(NEXT_STATUSCHANGE_DATE AS DATE) - CAST(ACTIVITY_DATE AS DATE)) AS DECIMAL(38, 15)) * 60 * 60 * 24) + ((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NEXT_STATUSCHANGE_DATE) - 
EXTRACT(HOUR FROM ACTIVITY_DATE)) * 60 * 60) + ((EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM NEXT_STATUSCHANGE_DATE) - EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM ACTIVITY_DATE)) * 60) + (EXTRACT(SECOND FROM NEXT_STATUSCHANGE_DATE) - 
EXTRACT(SECOND FROM ACTIVITY_DATE))) / 86400) END AS TIME_ELAPSED_DAYS,next_sevchange_date ,previous_severity
,case when work_act_flg = 'Y' and delivery_channel = 'OUTSOURCER' and nwa_delivery_channel = 'DIRECT' and nwa_crnt_wg_service_type <> 'ENTITLEMENT' then 'Y' else  'N' end  ee_flg
,case when work_act_flg = 'Y' and delivery_channel = 'OUTSOURCER' and nwa_delivery_channel = 'DIRECT' and nwa_crnt_wg_service_type <> 'ENTITLEMENT' then nwa_activity_date else null end  ee_date
,case when work_act_flg = 'Y' and pwa_delivery_channel = 'OUTSOURCER' and delivery_channel = 'DIRECT' and nwa_crnt_wg_service_type <> 'ENTITLEMENT' then 'Y' else  'N' end  ee_in_flg
,case when work_act_flg = 'Y' and delivery_channel = 'DIRECT' and nwa_delivery_channel = 'DIRECT' and res_role < nwa_res_role then 'Y' else  'N' end  ie_flg
,case when work_act_flg = 'Y' and delivery_channel = 'DIRECT' and nwa_delivery_channel = 'DIRECT' and res_role < nwa_res_role then nwa_activity_date else null end ie_date
,case when work_act_flg = 'Y' and pwa_delivery_channel = 'DIRECT' and delivery_channel = 'DIRECT' and pwa_res_role < res_role then 'Y' else  'N' end  ie_in_flg
,case when nda_chg_wg_service_type in ('ENTITLEMENT','GCC') and (chg_wg_service_type <> nwa_crnt_wg_service_type  or nwa_crnt_wg_service_type not in ('ENTITLEMENT','GCC')) and work_act_flg = 'Y'  and nda_prior_work_act = dw_case_activity_key   then 'Y'  else  'N' end  requeue_flg
,case when nda_chg_wg_service_type in ('ENTITLEMENT','GCC')  and (chg_wg_service_type <> nwa_crnt_wg_service_type  or nwa_crnt_wg_service_type not in ('ENTITLEMENT','GCC'))
and work_act_flg = 'Y'  and nda_prior_work_act = dw_case_activity_key then nwa_activity_date else null end  requeue_date
,case when work_act_flg = 'Y'  and upper(nda_current_owner_group_name) in ('WW-SCHEDULED-RESPONSE','WW-SCHEDULED RESPONSE','CRC-GLOBAL') then 'Y' else  'N' end  sd_flg
,case when work_act_flg = 'Y'  and upper(nda_current_owner_group_name) in ('WW-SCHEDULED-RESPONSE','WW-SCHEDULED RESPONSE','CRC-GLOBAL') then nda_activity_date else null end sd_date
,case when work_act_flg = 'Y'  and upper(pda_current_owner_group_name) in ('WW-SCHEDULED-RESPONSE','WW-SCHEDULED RESPONSE','CRC-GLOBAL') then 'Y' else  'N' end sd_in_flg
,work_act_flg transfer_flg ,case when activity_code in (4100,10500,10600) or (nwa_activity_code in (100,9200) and dispatch_act_flg = 'Y') then 'Y' else  'N'  end transfer_by_flg
,case when activity_code in (4100,10500,10600)  or (nwa_activity_code in (100,9200)  and dispatch_act_flg = 'Y') then activity_date else null end  transfer_by_date
,case when activity_code = 4100 then 'Y' else  'N' end  wh_in_flg ,case when activity_code = 4100 then activity_date else null end  wh_in_date 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CASE_ACTIVITY_LOG_5

select dw_case_activity_key
,incident_id
,incident_number
,casenumber
,case when activity_code > 10600 and incident_status_id is null then last_value(incident_status_id) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else incident_status_id end as  incident_status_id
,case when activity_code > 10600 and incident_status is null then last_value(incident_status) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else incident_status end as  incident_status
,case when activity_code > 10600 and current_severity is null then last_value(current_severity) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else current_severity end as  current_severity
,case when activity_code > 10600 and current_owner_cco_id is null then last_value(current_owner_cco_id) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else current_owner_cco_id end as  current_owner_cco_id
,case when activity_code > 10600 and current_owner_group_id is null then last_value(current_owner_group_id) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else current_owner_group_id end as  current_owner_group_id
,case when activity_code > 10600 and current_owner_group_name is null then last_value(current_owner_group_name) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else current_owner_group_name end as  current_owner_group_name
,case when activity_code > 10600 and current_contract_key is null then last_value(current_contract_key) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else current_contract_key end as  current_contract_key
,case when activity_code > 10600 and current_contract_svc_line_id is null then last_value(current_contract_svc_line_id) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else current_contract_svc_line_id end as  current_contract_svc_line_id
,case when activity_code > 10600 and current_dw_workgroup_key is null then last_value(current_dw_workgroup_key) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else current_dw_workgroup_key end as  current_dw_workgroup_key
,case when activity_code > 10600 and current_serial_number is null then last_value(current_serial_number) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else current_serial_number end as  current_serial_number
,activity_code ,activity_name  ,activity_date  
,case when activity_code > 10600 and creation_date is null then last_value(creation_date) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else creation_date end as creation_date
,case when activity_code > 10600 and initial_severity_id is null then last_value(initial_severity_id) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, case when activity_code = 1800 then -1 else activity_code end asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else initial_severity_id end as initial_severity_id
,activity_addnl_info
,case when activity_code > 10600 and res_role is null then last_value(res_role) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else res_role end as res_role
,case when activity_code > 10600 and delivery_channel is null then last_value(delivery_channel) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else delivery_channel end as  delivery_channel
,case when activity_code > 10600 and complexity is null then last_value(complexity) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else complexity end as  complexity
,chg_cco_id ,chg_dw_workgroup_key ,chg_wg_service_type ,sr_type ,note_type
,case when activity_code > 10600 and current_wg_service_type is null then last_value(current_wg_service_type) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else current_wg_service_type end as  current_wg_service_type
,case when activity_code > 10600 and dw_crnt_keyword_key is null or dw_crnt_keyword_key = '000000' then last_value(dw_crnt_keyword_key) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date asc, activity_code asc rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) else dw_crnt_keyword_key end as  dw_crnt_keyword_key
from $$STGDB.WI_REALUNIONSYN

select dw_case_activity_key,incident_id,incident_number,casenumber,incident_status_id,incident_status,current_severity,current_owner_cco_id,current_owner_group_id,
current_owner_group_name,current_contract_key,current_contract_svc_line_id,current_dw_workgroup_key,current_serial_number,activity_code,activity_name,
activity_date,creation_date,initial_severity_id,activity_addnl_info,res_role,delivery_channel,complexity,chg_cco_id,chg_dw_workgroup_key,chg_wg_service_type,
sr_type,note_type,current_wg_service_type,dw_crnt_keyword_key,work_act_flg,dispatch_act_flg,collab_act_flg,status_act_flg,sev_change_act_flg,
prior_work_act,next_work_act,prior_dispatch_act,next_dispatch_act,prior_collab_act,next_collab_act,next_statuschange_act,next_sevchange_act,prev_sevchange_act,
pwa_delivery_channel,pwa_res_role,nwa_activity_code,nwa_activity_date,nwa_delivery_channel,nwa_res_role,nwa_crnt_wg_service_type,pda_chg_wg_service_type,
pda_current_owner_group_name,
first_value (case when activity_code in (900,1100) then prior_work_act ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nda_prior_work_act,
nda_activity_date,nda_chg_wg_service_type,nda_current_owner_group_name,pca_activity_date,pca_activity_code,nca_activity_date,nca_activity_code,next_status,
next_statuschange_date,next_sevchange_date,
last_value (case when activity_code in (1800) then calc_previous_severity ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date, (case activity_code when 1800 then 1 else 2 end) asc rows between unbounded preceding and 0 preceding) previous_severity 
from $$STGDB.WI_CASE_ACTIVITY_LOG_4

select dw_case_activity_key, incident_id, incident_number, casenumber,incident_status_id, incident_status, current_severity, current_owner_cco_id, current_owner_group_id, 
current_owner_group_name, current_contract_key, current_contract_svc_line_id, current_dw_workgroup_key, current_serial_number, activity_code, activity_name, activity_date, 
creation_date, initial_severity_id, activity_addnl_info, res_role, delivery_channel, complexity, chg_cco_id, chg_dw_workgroup_key, chg_wg_service_type, 
sr_type, note_type, current_wg_service_type, dw_crnt_keyword_key,
case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then 'Y' else 'N' end as work_act_flg,
case when activity_code in (900,1100) then 'Y' else 'N' end as dispatch_act_flg,
case when activity_code in (20000,30100,30200,30300,40100,40200,40300) then 'Y' else 'N' end  collab_act_flg, 
case when activity_code = 300 then 'Y' else 'N' end  status_act_flg, 
case when activity_code = 1800 then 'Y' else 'N' end  sev_change_act_flg,
last_value (case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then dw_case_activity_key else null end IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as prior_work_act,
first_value (case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then dw_case_activity_key ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as next_work_act,
last_value (case when activity_code in (900,1100) then dw_case_activity_key ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as prior_dispatch_act,
first_value (case when activity_code in (900,1100) then dw_case_activity_key ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as next_dispatch_act,
last_value (case when activity_code in (20000,30100,30200,30300,40100,40200,40300) then dw_case_activity_key ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as prior_collab_act,
first_value (case when activity_code in (20000,30100,30200,30300,40100,40200,40300) then dw_case_activity_key ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as next_collab_act,
first_value (case when activity_code = 300 then dw_case_activity_key ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as next_statuschange_act,
first_value (case when activity_code = 1800 then dw_case_activity_key ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as next_sevchange_act,
last_value (case when activity_code = 1800 then dw_case_activity_key ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as prev_sevchange_act,
last_value (case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then delivery_channel ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as pwa_delivery_channel,
last_value (case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then res_role ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as pwa_res_role,
first_value (case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then activity_code ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nwa_activity_code,
first_value (case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then activity_date ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nwa_activity_date,
first_value (case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then delivery_channel ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nwa_delivery_channel,
first_value (case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then res_role ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nwa_res_role,
first_value (case when activity_code in (100,9200,4100,10500,10600) then current_wg_service_type ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nwa_crnt_wg_service_type,
last_value (case when activity_code in (900,1100) then chg_wg_service_type ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as pda_chg_wg_service_type,
last_value (case when activity_code in (900,1100) then current_owner_group_name ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as pda_current_owner_group_name,
first_value (case when activity_code in (900,1100) then activity_date ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nda_activity_date,
first_value (case when activity_code in (900,1100) then chg_wg_service_type ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nda_chg_wg_service_type,
first_value (case when activity_code in (900,1100) then current_owner_group_name ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nda_current_owner_group_name,
last_value (case when activity_code in (20000,30100,30200,30300,40100,40200,40300) then activity_date ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as pca_activity_date,
last_value (case when activity_code in (20000,30100,30200,30300,40100,40200,40300) then activity_code ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as pca_activity_code,
first_value (case when activity_code in (20000,30100,30200,30300,40100,40200,40300) then activity_date ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nca_activity_date,
first_value (case when activity_code in (20000,30100,30200,30300,40100,40200,40300) then activity_code ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as nca_activity_code,
first_value (case when activity_code = 300 then incident_status ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as next_status,
first_value (case when activity_code = 300 then activity_date ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as next_statuschange_date,
first_value (case when activity_code = 1800 then activity_date ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between 1 following and unbounded following) as next_sevchange_date,
last_value (case when activity_code in (600,1800) then current_severity ELSE NULL END IGNORE NULLS) over (partition by incident_number order by activity_date rows between unbounded preceding and 1 preceding) as calc_previous_severity
from $$STGDB.WI_CASE_ACTIVITY_LOG_3

select dw_case_activity_key     ,incident_id, 		incident_number,		casenumber ,incident_status_id ,incident_status    ,current_severity ,current_owner_cco_id
,current_owner_group_id, current_owner_group_name ,current_contract_key 
,Current_contract_svc_line_id
,Current_dw_workgroup_key
,current_serial_number
,activity_code
,activity_name
,activity_date
,creation_date
, 		initial_severity_id
, 		activity_addnl_info, 		res_role, 		delivery_channel, 		complexity, 		chg_cco_id, 		chg_dw_workgroup_key, 		chg_wg_service_type
,sr_type, 		note_type, 		current_wg_service_type 
,dw_crnt_keyword_key 
from $$STGDB.WI_BASE_CASEACTIVITY_LOG       
where dw_delete_flag = 'N'

union all

select dw_case_activity_key
,incident_id
,incident_number
,casenumber
,cast(case when incident_status_id = 'NULL' then null else incident_status_id end as integer) as  incident_status_id
,cast(case when incident_status = 'NULL' then null else incident_status end  as varchar(50)) as  incident_status
,case when current_severity = 'NULL' then null else current_severity end as  current_severity
,case when current_owner_cco_id = 'NULL' then null else current_owner_cco_id end as  current_owner_cco_id
,cast(case when current_owner_group_id = 'NULL' then null else current_owner_group_id end as integer) as  current_owner_group_id
,cast(case when current_owner_group_name = 'NULL' then null else current_owner_group_name end as varchar(50)) as  current_owner_group_name
,cast(case when current_contract_key = 'NULL' then null else current_contract_key end as integer) as  current_contract_key
,cast(case when current_contract_svc_line_id = 'NULL' then null else current_contract_svc_line_id end  as bigint) as  current_contract_svc_line_id
,case when current_dw_workgroup_key = -666 then null else current_dw_workgroup_key end as  current_dw_workgroup_key
,cast(case when current_serial_number = 'NULL' then null else current_serial_number end as varchar(50))as  current_serial_number
,activity_code
,activity_name
,activity_date
,cast(case when creation_date = '1900-01-01 00:00:00'  then null else creation_date end as timestamp(0))as creation_date
,case when initial_severity_id = -666 then null else initial_severity_id end as initial_severity_id
,activity_addnl_info
,case when res_role = -666 then null else res_role end as res_role
,case when delivery_channel = 'NULL' then null else delivery_channel end as  delivery_channel
,case when complexity = 'NULL' then null else complexity end as  complexity
,chg_cco_id
,chg_dw_workgroup_key
,cast(case when chg_wg_service_type = 'NULL' then null else chg_wg_service_type end as varchar(25))as chg_wg_service_type
,sr_type
,cast(case when note_type = 'NULL' then null else note_type end as varchar(100)) as  note_type
,cast(case when current_wg_service_type = 'NULL' then null else current_wg_service_type end as varchar(25)) as  current_wg_service_type
,case when dw_crnt_keyword_key = 'NULL' then null else dw_crnt_keyword_key end as  dw_crnt_keyword_key
from 
(
SELECT collab.dw_case_activity_key ,collab.incident_id ,collab.incident_number ,collab.casenumber   ,'NULL' AS incident_status_id  ,'NULL' AS incident_status  ,'NULL' AS current_severity
,collab.current_owner_cco_id ,'NULL' AS current_owner_group_id ,'NULL' AS current_owner_group_name ,'NULL' AS current_contract_key ,'NULL' AS current_contract_svc_line_id    
,collab.current_dw_workgroup_key ,'NULL' AS current_serial_number  ,collab.activity_code ,collab.activity_name    ,collab.activity_date   ,'1900/01/01 00:00:00' AS creation_date    ,- 666 AS initial_severity_id 
,cast(collab.activity_addnl_info as varchar(150))   activity_addnl_info ,- 666 res_role ,collab.delivery_channel    ,'NULL' AS complexity    ,collab.chg_cco_id    ,collab.chg_dw_workgroup_key    
,'NULL' AS chg_wg_service_type    ,collab.sr_type    ,'NULL' AS note_type    ,'NULL' AS current_wg_service_type  
,dw_crnt_keyword_key  
FROM (
 SELECT hash_md5(CONCAT ('COLLAB' , crf.casemoncollrequest_id)) AS dw_case_activity_key ,ticf.incident_id ,ticf.incident_number ,cast(ticf.casenumber AS BIGINT) casenumber
 ,CASE  WHEN ticf.b2b_flag = 'Y' THEN 'TAC-B2B' ELSE ticf.incident_type END AS sr_type ,upper(crf.collbr_requester_c3id) AS current_owner_cco_id 
 ,crf.requester_dw_workgroup_key AS current_dw_workgroup_key  ,upper(crf.collbr_requester_c3id) AS chg_cco_id  ,crf.requester_dw_workgroup_key AS chg_dw_workgroup_key 
 ,w.delivery_channel AS delivery_channel ,crf.case_tech_id ,crf.case_subtech_id ,crf.case_probcode_lookup AS problem_code 
 ,CASE  WHEN crf.collaboration_type = 'SKR'  THEN 20000    
 WHEN crf.collaboration_type = 'FFC'  THEN CASE   
 WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype IS NULL THEN 30100
  WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype = 'FTS'  THEN 30200
   WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype = 'MTZ' THEN 30300
   ELSE 30000
   END
     WHEN crf.collaboration_type = 'FAE' THEN CASE 
     WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype IS NULL THEN 40100
      WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype = 'FTS' THEN 40200
      WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype = 'MTZ' THEN 40300
      ELSE 40000 
      END  ELSE 20001
   END AS activity_code
    ,CASE 
            WHEN crf.collaboration_type = 'SKR'
                THEN 'Sneaker Net Collaboration'
            WHEN crf.collaboration_type = 'FFC'
                THEN CASE 
                        WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype IS NULL
                            THEN 'Regular Non-Urgent Collaboration'
                        WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype = 'FTS'
                            THEN 'Follow-the-Sun Non-Urgent Collaboration'
                        WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype = 'MTZ'
                            THEN 'My Tech Zone Non-Urgent Collaboration'
                        ELSE 'Unclassified Non-Urgent Collaboration'
                        END
            WHEN crf.collaboration_type = 'FAE'
                THEN CASE 
                        WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype IS NULL
                            THEN 'Regular Urgent Collaboration'
                        WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype = 'FTS'
                            THEN 'Follow-the-Sun Urgent Collaboration'
                        WHEN crf.collaboration_subtype = 'MTZ'
                            THEN 'My Tech Zone Urgent Collaboration'
                        ELSE 'Unclassified Urgent Collaboration'
                        END
            ELSE 'Collaboration'
            END AS activity_name
        ,'UNKNOWN' AS activity_addnl_info
        ,crf.creation_date AS activity_date
        ,k3cd.dw_crnt_keyword_key
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_COLLAB_REQUEST_F crf
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_CRNT_F_WTCALC ticf 
    ON crf.c3_sr_number = ticf.incident_number
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC trd 
    ON upper(crf.kc_cec_id) = trd.cco_id
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WORKGROUP_HIER_V18_D w 
    ON trd.workgroup_id = w.natural_key
    LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_KEYWORD_3D_CURRENT_D k3cd 
ON crf.case_tech_id = k3cd.tech_id
AND crf.case_subtech_id = k3cd.sub_tech_id
AND COALESCE(crf.case_probcode_lookup, '_') = k3cd.problem_code
WHERE crf.creation_date >= trd.bl_effective_from_date
AND crf.creation_date < trd.bl_effective_to_date
qualify row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY crf.casemoncollrequest_id ORDER BY trd.bl_resource_key DESC) = 1) collab
INNER JOIN (select distinct incident_number from $$STGDB.WI_BASE_CASEACTIVITY_LOG) B
ON collab.incident_number = B.incident_number

union all

 select RMA.dw_case_activity_key ,RMA.incident_id ,RMA.incident_number ,RMA.casenumber  ,'NULL' as  incident_status_id ,'NULL' as  incident_status ,'NULL' as  current_severity 
,'NULL' as  current_owner_cco_id ,'NULL' as  current_owner_group_id ,'NULL' as  current_owner_group_name ,'NULL' as  current_contract_key ,'NULL' as  current_contract_svc_line_id 
,-666 as  current_dw_workgroup_key ,'NULL' as  current_serial_number ,RMA.activity_code  ,RMA.activity_name ,RMA.activity_date ,'1900/01/01 00:00:00' AS creation_date ,-666 as initial_severity_id
,RMA.activity_addnl_info ,-666 as res_role  ,'NULL' as  delivery_channel ,'NULL' as  complexity ,RMA.chg_cco_id ,RMA.chg_dw_workgroup_key ,'NULL' as  chg_wg_service_type ,RMA.sr_type
,'NULL' as  note_type ,'NULL' as  current_wg_service_type ,'NULL'  as  dw_crnt_keyword_key 
from ( select HASH_MD5(concat('RMA',oh.bl_order_key)) as dw_case_activity_key, ticf.incident_id, ticf.incident_number, cast(ticf.casenumber as bigint) casenumber
,case when ticf.b2b_flag = 'Y' then 'TAC-B2B' else ticf.incident_type end as sr_type ,trd.cco_id as chg_cco_id ,w.dw_workgroup_key as chg_dw_workgroup_key ,'RMA Created' as activity_name
,100000 as activity_code ,CAST(oh.BL_ORDER_KEY AS VARCHAR(150))as activity_addnl_info ,oh.CREATION_DATE as activity_date         
from $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_ORDER_HEADERS_F_WTCALC  oh 
inner join $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_ORDER_LINES_F_WTCALC  ol 
on oh.bl_order_key = ol.bl_order_key
inner join $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_LOOKUPS_D  lkp
on oh.order_type_lkp_key = lkp.bl_lookup_key
inner join $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_CRNT_F_WTCALC ticf
on oh.incident_id = ticf.incident_id
inner join $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC  trd
on oh.creator_resource_key = trd.bl_resource_key
inner join $$STGDB.ST_WORKGROUP_HIER_V18_D w
on oh.CREATOR_WORKGROUP_KEY = w.natural_key
where  case when lkp.bl_lookup_key in( -777,-888,-999) then lkp.code else lkp.BL_ATTRIBUTE3 end = 'CUSTOMER' 
and ol.shippable_flag = 'Y' 
and ol.shipped_quantity is not null
and lkp.LOOKUP_TYPE in ('TSI_OE_ORDER_TXN_TYPES','Error','Not Available','Not Applicable')
qualify row_number() over (partition by oh.bl_order_key order by cast(oh.CREATION_DATE as timestamp) asc) = 1
) RMA
INNER JOIN (select distinct incident_number from $$STGDB.WI_BASE_CASEACTIVITY_LOG) B
ON RMA.incident_number = B.incident_number

union all

select BDB.dw_case_activity_key,  incident_id ,BDB.incident_number ,BDB.casenumber ,'NULL'  as incident_status_id , 'NULL'  as  incident_status ,'NULL'  as  current_severity 
,'NULL'  as  current_owner_cco_id ,'NULL'  as  current_owner_group_id ,'NULL' as  current_owner_group_name ,'NULL' as  current_contract_key ,'NULL' as  current_contract_svc_line_id 
,-666 as  current_dw_workgroup_key ,'NULL' as  current_serial_number ,BDB.activity_code ,BDB.activity_name ,BDB.activity_date ,'1900/01/01 00:00:00' as creation_date ,-666 initial_severity_id
,BDB.activity_addnl_info ,NULL as res_role ,'NULL' as  delivery_channel ,'NULL' as  complexity ,BDB.chg_cco_id ,BDB.chg_dw_workgroup_key ,'NULL' as  chg_wg_service_type ,BDB.sr_type
,'NULL' as  note_type, 'NULL' as  current_wg_service_type ,'NULL' as  dw_crnt_keyword_key  
from (
select HASH_MD5(concat('bdb_messages',bdb.id)) as dw_case_activity_key, ticf.incident_id  as incident_id, ticf.incident_number,  cast(ticf.casenumber as bigint) casenumber,
case when ticf.b2b_flag = 'Y' then 'TAC-B2B' else ticf.incident_type end as sr_type , trd.cco_id as chg_cco_id ,w.dw_workgroup_key as chg_dw_workgroup_key ,'BDB Execution' as activity_name
,101000 as activity_code ,cast(bdb.job_id as varchar(150)) as activity_addnl_info ,cast(substr(BDB.eventdatetime,1,19) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as activity_date      
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_BDB_MESSAGES bdb
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_BDB_TASKS t
ON bdb.task_name = t.NAME
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_CRNT_F_WTCALC ticf
ON bdb.sr_id = ticf.incident_number
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC trd
ON CASE WHEN Upper (bdb.username) = 'JUNKER' THEN 'NOT Available' ELSE Upper (bdb.username) END = trd.cco_id
and  cast(substr(BDB.eventdatetime,1,19) as timestamp(0)) >= trd.bl_effective_from_date 
and  cast(substr(BDB.eventdatetime,1,19) as timestamp(0)) < trd.bl_effective_to_date
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WORKGROUP_HIER_V18_D w
ON trd.workgroup_id = w.natural_key
WHERE t.admin_labels NOT LIKE '%noAnalytics%'
qualify  Row_Number () Over (PARTITION BY bdb.id ORDER BY bl_resource_key DESC) = 1) BDB
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT	DISTINCT incident_number FROM $$STGDB.WI_BASE_CASEACTIVITY_LOG) C
 ON BDB.incident_number = C.incident_number
 
 union all

SELECT BUG.DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY, BUG.INCIDENT_ID, BUG.INCIDENT_NUMBER, BUG.CASENUMBER, 'NULL' AS  INCIDENT_STATUS_ID, 'NULL' AS  INCIDENT_STATUS
, 'NULL' AS  CURRENT_SEVERITY, 'NULL' AS  CURRENT_OWNER_CCO_ID, 'NULL' AS  CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_ID,'NULL' AS  CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_NAME
, 'NULL' AS  CURRENT_CONTRACT_KEY,  'NULL' AS  CURRENT_CONTRACT_SVC_LINE_ID, -666 AS  CURRENT_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY, 'NULL' AS  CURRENT_SERIAL_NUMBER
, BUG.ACTIVITY_CODE, BUG.ACTIVITY_NAME, BUG.ACTIVITY_DATE, '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS CREATION_DATE,-666 AS INITIAL_SEVERITY_ID,  BUG.ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO
, -666 AS RES_ROLE, 'NULL' AS  DELIVERY_CHANNEL, 'NULL' AS  COMPLEXITY, BUG.CHG_CCO_ID, BUG.CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,'NULL' AS  CHG_WG_SERVICE_TYPE
, BUG.SR_TYPE, 'NULL' AS  NOTE_TYPE, 'NULL' AS  CURRENT_WG_SERVICE_TYPE, 'NULL' AS  DW_CRNT_KEYWORD_KEY 
FROM (
select hash_MD5(concat('defect',defect.id)) as dw_case_activity_key ,ticf.incident_id  as incident_id ,ticf.incident_number ,cast(ticf.casenumber as bigint) casenumber
,case when ticf.b2b_flag = 'Y' then 'TAC-B2B' else ticf.incident_type end as sr_type ,trd.cco_id as chg_cco_id ,w.dw_workgroup_key as chg_dw_workgroup_key ,'Bug Attached' as activity_name
,102000 as activity_code ,defect.createddate AS activity_date ,defect.id as activity_addnl_info
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_DEFECT defect
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_CRNT_F_WTCALC ticf
ON defect.case_c3number__c = ticf.incident_number
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC trd
ON  upper (defect.created_by__c) = trd.cco_id
AND defect.createddate >= trd.bl_effective_from_date
AND defect.createddate <  trd.bl_effective_to_date
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WORKGROUP_HIER_V18_D w
ON trd.workgroup_id = w.natural_key
qualify row_number() over (partition by defect.id order by bl_resource_key desc) = 1
) BUG
INNER JOIN  (SELECT DISTINCT incident_number     FROM $$STGDB.WI_BASE_CASEACTIVITY_LOG) Y
ON BUG.incident_number = Y.incident_number
) syn_act
